briefdescription.para: Majority function: Maj(x,y,z) = (x ∧ y) ⊕ (x ∧ z) ⊕ (y ∧ z).
Big Sigma-0: Σ₀(x) = ROTR²(x) ⊕ ROTR¹³(x) ⊕ ROTR²²(x).
Big Sigma-1: Σ₁(x) = ROTR⁶(x) ⊕ ROTR¹¹(x) ⊕ ROTR²⁵(x).
Small sigma-0: σ₀(x) = ROTR⁷(x) ⊕ ROTR¹⁸(x) ⊕ SHR³(x).
Small sigma-1: σ₁(x) = ROTR¹⁷(x) ⊕ ROTR¹⁹(x) ⊕ SHR¹⁰(x).

detaileddescription.para: Can be called repeatedly with arbitrary chunk sizes.

briefdescription.para: Finalize the hash and produce the 32-byte digest.

detaileddescription.para: After calling this, the context must be re-initialized before reuse.

parameterdescription.para: Output buffer (must be at least 32 bytes).

briefdescription.para: SHA-256 implementation — FIPS 180-4 compliant, pure C99.

detaileddescription.para: No heap allocation, no floating point, no external dependencies. Static K[64] round constants table consumes ~256 bytes of ROM.
